prophecies.a: 「莫罗博士在他的岛上用手术刀和化学药剂改造动物，赋予它们人类的形态和部分智能。他相信生命的形态是可以被人为重塑的。」——《莫罗博士岛》（1896）
prophecies.a_en: "Dr. Moreau on his island reshaped animals with scalpels and chemicals, giving them human form and partial intelligence. He believed the shape of life could be artificially remade." — The Island of Doctor Moreau (1896)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1996年克隆羊多莉诞生，2003年人类基因组计划完成，2012年CRISPR基因编辑技术问世。虽然威尔斯描写的是外科手术改造而非基因编辑，但其核心理念——人类可以人为改变和重塑生命形态——已通过现代基因工程完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Dolly the sheep was cloned in 1996, the Human Genome Project was completed in 2003, and CRISPR gene editing emerged in 2012. While Wells described surgical rather than genetic modification, his core idea—that humans can artificially reshape life forms—has been fully realized through modern genetic engineering.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.q: 威尔斯对基因工程的预言
prophecies.a: 莫罗博士通过外科手术和生物学操控将动物改造成具有人类特征的生物。（《莫罗博士岛》）
prophecies.a_en: Dr. Moreau transforms animals into creatures with human characteristics through surgery and biological manipulation. (The Island of Doctor Moreau)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 威尔斯1896年的《莫罗博士岛》预见了通过生物技术改造生物体。1996年克隆羊多莉诞生，开启了基因工程时代。如今CRISPR基因编辑技术使跨物种基因操作成为现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wells' 1896 'The Island of Doctor Moreau' foresaw biological modification of organisms. Dolly the sheep was cloned in 1996, launching the genetic engineering era. Today CRISPR gene editing makes cross-species genetic manipulation a reality.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1896年在《莫罗博士岛》中描写生物改造，1996年克隆羊多莉诞生标志基因工程时代开始
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells wrote about biological modification in 'Doctor Moreau' (1896); Dolly the sheep (1996) marked the start of the genetic engineering era

prophecies.a: 莫罗博士通过外科手术和活体解剖将动物改造成半人类形态，赋予它们直立行走和说话的能力。（《莫罗博士岛》）
prophecies.a_en: Dr. Moreau transforms animals into semi-human forms through surgery and vivisection, giving them the ability to walk upright and speak. (The Island of Doctor Moreau)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1996年多利羊成为首个成功克隆的哺乳动物，开启了基因工程新时代。此后基因编辑技术（CRISPR-Cas9，2012年发明）使精确修改生物基因成为可能。虽然方法与莫罗博士不同，但「人为改造生物」的核心概念已经实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Dolly the sheep became the first cloned mammal in 1996, opening a new era of genetic engineering. CRISPR-Cas9 (invented 2012) later enabled precise gene editing. While methods differ from Dr. Moreau, the core concept of 'artificially modifying organisms' has been realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1896年描述的生物改造在1996年多利羊克隆后开始部分实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells' 1896 biological modification began partial realization after the 1996 cloning of Dolly

prophecies.a: 「一道无形的、炽热的光线射向人群。凡是光线扫过之处，一切都燃烧起来——树木、房屋、人体。那是一种超越人类理解的集中热能武器。」——《世界大战》（1898）
prophecies.a_en: "An invisible, intensely hot beam swept over the crowd. Wherever it touched, everything burst into flames—trees, houses, bodies. It was a weapon of concentrated heat beyond human understanding." — The War of the Worlds (1898)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2014年，美国海军在波斯湾部署了首款实战激光武器系统（LaWS），能够以集中光能摧毁无人机和小型船只。此后各国军方持续发展高能激光武器。威尔斯1898年描写的「集中热能光线武器」概念与现代激光武器原理高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2014, the US Navy deployed the first operational Laser Weapon System (LaWS) in the Persian Gulf, capable of destroying drones and small boats with concentrated light energy. Wells's 1898 concept of a 'concentrated heat-ray weapon' closely matches the principle of modern laser weapons.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「门在人走近时自动打开，无需触碰任何东西。房间里的灯在有人进入时自动点亮。」——《当沉睡者醒来时》（1899）
prophecies.a_en: "Doors opened automatically as one approached, without touching anything. Lights in rooms turned on automatically when someone entered." — When the Sleeper Wakes (1899)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1960年代，自动感应门开始在商业建筑中普及。Dee Horton和Lew Hewitt于1954年发明了首款现代自动门。运动感应灯光系统则在1980年代广泛应用。威尔斯在1899年对这些自动化设备的描述极为准确。
prophecies.verdict_en: In the 1960s, automatic sensor doors became common in commercial buildings. Dee Horton and Lew Hewitt invented the first modern automatic door in 1954. Motion-sensing lighting systems became widespread in the 1980s. Wells's 1899 descriptions of these automated devices were remarkably accurate.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「在那个时代，有一种装置可以将活动的画面和声音同时传送到远方。人们坐在家中就能看到千里之外正在发生的事情。」——《当沉睡者醒来时》（1899）
prophecies.a_en: "In that era, there was a device that could transmit moving pictures and sound simultaneously to distant places. People could sit at home and see events happening thousands of miles away." — When the Sleeper Wakes (1899)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1936年，BBC开始世界上首次定期公共电视广播服务。威尔斯在1899年描述的「远程传输活动画面和声音的装置」完全就是电视的概念。后来视频通讯技术（Skype 2003年、FaceTime 2010年）更进一步印证了他关于远程视觉通讯的预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1936, the BBC began the world's first regular public television broadcasting service. Wells's 1899 description of a 'device transmitting moving pictures and sound to distant places' is exactly the concept of television. Later video communication (Skype 2003, FaceTime 2010) further confirmed his vision of remote visual communication.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「到了那个时代，书籍将被一种便携的装置取代。人们可以随时随地听到任何一本书被朗读出来，知识的传播将不再依赖纸张。」——《当沉睡者醒来时》（1899）
prophecies.a_en: "In that era, books will be replaced by a portable device. People can hear any book read aloud anytime, anywhere, and knowledge dissemination will no longer depend on paper." — When the Sleeper Wakes (1899)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 有声读物的概念从1930年代开始发展，2007年亚马逊推出Kindle电子阅读器，2008年推出Audible有声书平台。如今智能手机上的有声书应用让人们可以随时随地「听书」。威尔斯关于「便携设备取代纸质书」的预言已充分实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Audiobooks began developing in the 1930s; Amazon launched Kindle in 2007 and the Audible audiobook platform in 2008. Today, audiobook apps on smartphones let people 'listen to books' anytime. Wells's vision of 'portable devices replacing paper books' has been fully realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.q: 威尔斯对自动门的预言
prophecies.a: 小说中描写了由触发机制自动开关的门，不需要手动操作。（《当沉睡者醒来时》）
prophecies.a_en: The novel describes doors that open and close automatically via trigger mechanisms, without manual operation. (When the Sleeper Wakes)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 威尔斯1899年的小说《当沉睡者醒来时》描写了自动门。第一扇商用自动门于1960年在美国安装。如今自动门在商场、医院、机场等公共场所无处不在。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wells' 1899 novel 'When the Sleeper Wakes' described automatic doors. The first commercial automatic door was installed in the US in 1960. Today automatic doors are ubiquitous in malls, hospitals, and airports.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1899年小说中描述自动门，首扇商用自动门于1960年安装
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells described automatic doors in his 1899 novel; the first commercial automatic door was installed in 1960

prophecies.q: 自动人行道/传送带步道
prophecies.a: 在未来伦敦，巨大的自动传送带代替了街道，人们站在不同速度的传送带上移动，无需步行。（《当睡者醒来时》）
prophecies.a_en: In future London, massive conveyor belts replace streets. People stand on belts moving at different speeds, requiring no walking. (When the Sleeper Wakes)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1954年泽西城哈德逊百货公司安装了首个现代自动人行道。如今自动人行道（travelator）遍布全球机场和大型商业设施。虽然规模未达到威尔斯描述的「取代街道」的程度，但概念完全一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: The first modern moving walkway was installed at Hudson department store in Jersey City in 1954. Today travelators are ubiquitous in airports and large commercial facilities worldwide. While not replacing streets as Wells envisioned, the concept is identical.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1899年描述的自动传送步道在1954年首个现代自动人行道安装时实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells' 1899 conveyor walkways were realized when the first modern moving walkway was installed in 1954

prophecies.a: 在未来世界中，人们通过电子设备发送书面信息，无需等待邮递，信息可以即时到达任何地方。（《当睡者醒来时》）
prophecies.a_en: In the future world, people send written messages through electronic devices without waiting for mail delivery; messages arrive instantly anywhere. (When the Sleeper Wakes)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1971年Ray Tomlinson发送了首封电子邮件。此后电子通讯迅速发展：BBS（1978）、互联网邮件（1990s）、即时通讯（ICQ 1996）、短信（2000s）、WhatsApp/微信（2010s）。威尔斯1899年的设想完全实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Ray Tomlinson sent the first email in 1971. Electronic communication then rapidly evolved: BBS (1978), internet email (1990s), instant messaging (ICQ 1996), texting (2000s), WhatsApp/WeChat (2010s). Wells' 1899 vision was fully realized.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1899年描述的电子书面通讯在1971年首封电子邮件发送时实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells' 1899 electronic written communication was realized when the first email was sent in 1971

prophecies.a: 「凯沃石隔绝了引力，球形飞船缓缓升起，穿过大气层，飞向月球。他们在月球表面降落，在低重力环境中弹跳行走，发现了地下的月球文明。」——《最早登上月球的人》（1901）
prophecies.a_en: "Cavorite blocked gravity, and the spherical craft rose slowly through the atmosphere toward the Moon. They landed on the lunar surface, bounced in low gravity, and discovered an underground lunar civilization." — The First Men in the Moon (1901)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1969年7月20日，阿波罗11号成功登月，尼尔·阿姆斯特朗成为首位踏上月球的人类。威尔斯关于人类乘坐飞船登月、在低重力中行走的预言已应验。但反重力物质「凯沃石」和月球地下文明至今未被发现。
prophecies.verdict_en: On July 20, 1969, Apollo 11 landed on the Moon and Neil Armstrong became the first person to walk on it. Wells's prediction of humans traveling to the Moon in a spacecraft and walking in low gravity came true. However, the anti-gravity substance 'Cavorite' and underground lunar civilization have not been found.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.q: 第一次世界大战的规模
prophecies.a: 「下一场战争将不同于以往任何战争。它将是一场全面的、机械化的战争，参战国的全部工业力量都将投入其中，平民将与军人一同遭受苦难。」——《预测》（1901）
prophecies.a_en: "The next war will be unlike any before. It will be a total, mechanized war in which the entire industrial power of nations will be engaged, and civilians will suffer alongside soldiers." — Anticipations (1901)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1914年至1918年的第一次世界大战正是人类历史上首场全面的工业化战争。机枪、毒气、飞机、坦克等新武器投入使用，参战国动员了全部工业产能，平民伤亡惨重。威尔斯在1901年对「全面机械化战争」的预言完全应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: World War I (1914-1918) was indeed history's first total industrialized war. Machine guns, poison gas, aircraft, and tanks were deployed; nations mobilized their full industrial capacity; civilian casualties were massive. Wells's 1901 prediction of 'total, mechanized war' was fully confirmed.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.q_en: World Government and League of Nations
prophecies.a: 「战争之后，各国将被迫组建一个世界性的管理机构来维持和平。民族国家将让渡部分主权给这个超国家组织，否则人类将在反复的战争中走向毁灭。」——《预测》（1901）及后续作品
prophecies.a_en: "After the war, nations will be forced to form a world governing body to maintain peace. Nation-states will cede some sovereignty to this supranational organization, or humanity will march toward destruction through repeated wars." — Anticipations (1901) and later works
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1920年成立的国际联盟和1945年成立的联合国部分印证了威尔斯的预言。各国确实组建了超国家组织来维护和平。但威尔斯设想的是真正的世界政府——各国让渡主权的统一管理机构——这一目标远未实现，联合国更多是协调机构而非世界政府。
prophecies.verdict_en: The League of Nations (1920) and United Nations (1945) partially confirmed Wells's vision. Nations did form supranational organizations for peace. But Wells envisioned a true world government with sovereignty transfer, which remains far from reality—the UN is more a coordinating body than a world government.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「未来的战场上将弥漫着有毒的烟雾和气体，士兵们需要佩戴防毒面具才能作战。化学武器将使战争变得更加残酷和非人道。」——《预测》（1901）与《空中战争》（1908）
prophecies.a_en: "Future battlefields will be shrouded in toxic smoke and gas; soldiers will need gas masks to fight. Chemical weapons will make warfare more brutal and inhumane." — Anticipations (1901) and The War in the Air (1908)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1915年4月22日，德军在伊普尔战役中首次大规模使用氯气，开启了化学武器时代。此后芥子气等毒气被广泛使用，防毒面具成为一战士兵标配。威尔斯关于「有毒气体弥漫战场」和「防毒面具」的预言完全应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: On April 22, 1915, German forces first used chlorine gas on a large scale at the Battle of Ypres, beginning the chemical weapons era. Mustard gas and other agents were widely used thereafter, and gas masks became standard WWI equipment. Wells's predictions about 'toxic gas on battlefields' and 'gas masks' were fully confirmed.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 贝德福德和凯沃尔乘坐球形飞船飞向月球。他们经历了失重状态，在月球表面行走时发现月球引力只有地球的六分之一。（《最先登上月球的人》）
prophecies.a_en: Bedford and Cavor fly to the Moon in a spherical vessel. They experience weightlessness and discover the Moon's gravity is one-sixth of Earth's when walking on its surface. (The First Men in the Moon)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1969年阿波罗11号登月证实了威尔斯描述的许多细节：失重体验、月球六分之一引力、月球表面的荒凉景象。威尔斯甚至准确描述了宇航员在低重力环境中跳跃行走的方式。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1969 Apollo 11 Moon landing confirmed many details Wells described: weightlessness, one-sixth lunar gravity, and the Moon's desolate surface. Wells even accurately described how astronauts would hop-walk in low gravity.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1901年小说中的登月细节在1969年阿波罗11号任务中得到验证
prophecies.yearReason_en: Moon landing details in Wells' 1901 novel were verified by the Apollo 11 mission in 1969

prophecies.a: 「那些陆地铁甲舰——巨大的、无法穿透的钢铁战车——像虫子一样在田野上碾过，碾碎铁丝网和掩体，士兵们在里面操纵着机枪。」——《陆地铁甲舰》（1903）
prophecies.a_en: "The land ironclads—huge, impervious steel vehicles—crawled over the fields like great beetles, crushing wire fences and shelters, with men inside working machine guns." — The Land Ironclads (1903)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1916年9月15日，英军在索姆河战役中首次将坦克（Mark I）投入实战，比威尔斯的描写晚了13年。威尔斯描述的装甲战车、碾压铁丝网和掩体、车内操控机枪等细节与实际坦克高度吻合。温斯顿·丘吉尔曾公开承认威尔斯的这篇小说对坦克概念的影响。
prophecies.verdict_en: On September 15, 1916, British forces deployed tanks (Mark I) in the Battle of the Somme, 13 years after Wells's description. His details of armored vehicles crushing wire fences and shelters with machine guns operated from inside closely match actual tanks. Winston Churchill publicly acknowledged the influence of Wells's story on the tank concept.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 巨大的钢铁陆地战舰在战场上横冲直撞，碾过战壕和铁丝网，对步兵进行毁灭性打击。（《陆地铁甲舰》）
prophecies.a_en: Huge steel land battleships rumble across battlefields, crushing trenches and barbed wire, devastating infantry. (The Land Ironclads)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 威尔斯1903年短篇小说《陆地铁甲舰》描述了装甲战车突破堑壕防线的场景。1916年9月15日，英国在索姆河战役中首次使用坦克（Mark I型），改变了现代战争。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wells' 1903 short story 'The Land Ironclads' described armored vehicles breaking through trench lines. On September 15, 1916, Britain first deployed tanks (Mark I) at the Battle of the Somme, transforming modern warfare.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1903年在《陆地铁甲舰》中描述了装甲战车，坦克于1916年首次投入战场
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells described armored vehicles in 'The Land Ironclads' (1903); tanks were first used in battle in 1916

prophecies.q: 空中战争：飞机轰炸城市
prophecies.q_en: Aerial Warfare: Bombing Cities from the Air
prophecies.a: 「空中的战争舰队飞越城市，投下毁灭性的炸弹，整座城市在火焰中化为废墟。文明将在空中轰炸中瓦解。」——《空中战争》（1908）
prophecies.a_en: "Fleets of airships swept over cities, dropping devastating bombs, turning entire cities to rubble in flames. Civilization would crumble under aerial bombardment." — The War in the Air (1908)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1940年至1945年间，空中轰炸成为二战核心战术。伦敦大轰炸（1940-1941）、德累斯顿轰炸（1945）、东京大轰炸（1945）等事件完整印证了威尔斯关于空中力量摧毁城市的预言。威尔斯甚至预见了这种战争形态将动摇文明根基。
prophecies.verdict_en: From 1940 to 1945, aerial bombing became a core WWII tactic. The London Blitz (1940-1941), Dresden bombing (1945), and Tokyo firebombing (1945) fully confirmed Wells's vision of air power destroying cities. He even foresaw that this form of warfare would shake the foundations of civilization.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「飞行器将成为战争中最具毁灭性的武器。未来的城市将从空中被摧毁。」（《空中战争》）
prophecies.a_en: "Flying machines will become the most devastating weapons of war. Future cities will be destroyed from the air." (The War in the Air)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 威尔斯1908年的《空中战争》描写了飞机摧毁城市的场景。1940年伦敦大轰炸、1945年德累斯顿和东京大轰炸、以及原子弹投掷都印证了空中力量成为战争核心的预言。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wells' 1908 'The War in the Air' depicted aircraft destroying cities. The 1940 London Blitz, 1945 Dresden and Tokyo firebombing, and atomic bombings all confirmed that air power became central to warfare.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1908年《空中战争》预言空中力量毁灭城市，1940年伦敦大轰炸开始大规模实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells predicted aerial destruction of cities in 'The War in the Air' (1908); mass realization began with the 1940 London Blitz

prophecies.a: 在未来战争中，飞行器从空中投掷炸弹，摧毁城市和工业设施。战争不再限于前线，后方平民也成为攻击目标。（《空中战争》）
prophecies.q_en: Night bombing and strategic air warfare
prophecies.a_en: In future wars, aircraft drop bombs from the sky, destroying cities and industrial facilities. War is no longer limited to the front lines; civilians in the rear also become targets. (The War in the Air)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1940-1945年二战期间战略轰炸成为现实：伦敦闪电战、德累斯顿轰炸、东京大空袭、广岛长崎原子弹。威尔斯在1908年就预见了空中力量彻底改变战争形态，平民不再安全。
prophecies.verdict_en: Strategic bombing became reality during WWII (1940-1945): the London Blitz, Dresden bombing, Tokyo firebombing, Hiroshima and Nagasaki atomic bombs. Wells foresaw in 1908 how airpower would fundamentally transform warfare, leaving civilians unsafe.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1908年《空中战争》中的战略轰炸预言在1940年二战中实现
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells' 1908 strategic bombing predictions in 'The War in the Air' were realized in WWII starting 1940

prophecies.q: 威尔斯对原子弹的预言
prophecies.a: 「他们突然在天空中看到了日出般的闪光。科学家称之为'原子弹'。一枚原子弹就能摧毁整座城市。」（《获自由的世界》）
prophecies.q_en: Wells' prediction of the atomic bomb
prophecies.a_en: "They saw a flash in the sky like a sunrise. Scientists called them 'atomic bombs'. A single atomic bomb could destroy an entire city." (The World Set Free)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 威尔斯在1914年的小说《获自由的世界》中首次使用「原子弹」这一术语，描述了核武器毁灭城市的场景。1945年美国在广岛和长崎投下原子弹。物理学家利奥·西拉德承认威尔斯的小说启发了他对链式反应的思考。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wells first coined the term 'atomic bomb' in his 1914 novel 'The World Set Free', depicting nuclear weapons destroying cities. The US dropped atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki in 1945. Physicist Leo Szilard acknowledged Wells' novel inspired his thinking about chain reactions.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1914年在《获自由的世界》中首创「原子弹」术语，1945年原子弹实际投入使用
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells coined 'atomic bomb' in 'The World Set Free' (1914); actual atomic bombs were used in 1945

prophecies.a: 「那些原子弹——每一颗不比一个橘子大多少——蕴含着令人难以想象的毁灭性原子能量。它被投下后不是一次性爆炸，而是持续不断地爆炸，一个永不熄灭的火球在废墟中燃烧数日。」——《获得自由的世界》（1914）
prophecies.a_en: "The atomic bombs—no bigger than an orange—contained an unimaginable destructive atomic energy. Once dropped, they did not explode in one instant but kept on exploding, an incessant blaze amid the ruins for days." — The World Set Free (1914)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1945年8月6日和9日，美国在广岛和长崎投下原子弹。威尔斯在31年前不仅预言了「原子弹」这一名称（atomic bomb），还预见了由空中投掷、造成城市级毁灭的核武器。物理学家利奥·西拉德曾表示，正是这部小说激发了他对核链式反应的思考。
prophecies.verdict_en: On August 6 and 9, 1945, the US dropped atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. Wells predicted not only the name 'atomic bomb' 31 years earlier, but also air-dropped weapons causing city-level destruction. Physicist Leo Szilard stated that this novel inspired his thinking about nuclear chain reactions.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「原子能不仅是毁灭的力量，也是建设的力量。当人类学会控制原子裂变的能量，它将成为取之不尽的能源，驱动整个城市的运转。」——《获得自由的世界》（1914）
prophecies.a_en: "Atomic energy is not only a force of destruction but also of construction. When humanity learns to control atomic fission energy, it will become an inexhaustible power source driving entire cities." — The World Set Free (1914)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1956年，英国开尔德霍尔（Calder Hall）核电站投入商业运营，成为世界首座商用核电站。截至2025年，全球约有440座核反应堆在运行，提供约10%的全球电力。威尔斯在1914年关于「控制原子能作为城市能源」的预言完全应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1956, Britain's Calder Hall became the world's first commercial nuclear power station. As of 2025, about 440 nuclear reactors operate globally, providing roughly 10% of world electricity. Wells's 1914 prediction about 'controlling atomic energy as a city power source' was fully confirmed.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.a: 「1940年1月，战争在欧洲爆发……德国向波兰发动进攻……随后战火蔓延至全球。」——《未来事物的面貌》（1933）
prophecies.a_en: "In January 1940, war breaks out in Europe... Germany attacks Poland... then the conflict spreads worldwide." — The Shape of Things to Come (1933)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1939年9月1日，德国入侵波兰，第二次世界大战爆发。威尔斯在1933年的小说中预言了德国进攻波兰引发世界大战，时间仅偏差数月（小说写1940年1月，实际为1939年9月），核心情节——德国攻击波兰、战火蔓延全球——完全应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: On September 1, 1939, Germany invaded Poland, starting WWII. Wells predicted in 1933 that Germany would attack Poland and trigger a world war, off by only months (novel said January 1940, actual was September 1939). The core scenario—Germany attacking Poland and war spreading globally—was fully confirmed.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.q: 全球信息网络：万维百科
prophecies.a: 「一部世界性的百科全书……所有人类知识将被收集、索引、整理，通过一个全球性的网络让每个人都能随时获取任何信息。它将是一个永久的世界大脑。」——《世界大脑》（1938）
prophecies.a_en: "A world encyclopaedia... all human knowledge will be collected, indexed, organized, and made available to everyone through a worldwide network at any time. It would be a permanent World Brain." — World Brain (1938)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1991年，蒂姆·伯纳斯-李发明了万维网（World Wide Web），2001年维基百科上线。威尔斯1938年提出的「世界大脑」概念——一个全球性的、可检索的知识网络——与互联网和维基百科的实际功能惊人吻合。蒂姆·伯纳斯-李本人也曾提及威尔斯的「世界大脑」概念对其工作的启发。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1991, Tim Berners-Lee invented the World Wide Web; Wikipedia launched in 2001. Wells's 1938 'World Brain' concept—a global, searchable knowledge network—remarkably matches the internet and Wikipedia. Berners-Lee himself has referenced Wells's 'World Brain' as an inspiration for his work.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels

prophecies.q: 威尔斯对互联网的预言
prophecies.a: 「一个永久性的世界百科全书将使所有知识对全人类开放。通过某种通讯网络，任何人在任何地方都可以查阅人类一切知识的总和。」（《世界大脑》）
prophecies.a_en: "A permanent world encyclopaedia will make all knowledge available to all humanity. Through some network of communication, anyone anywhere can consult the sum total of all human knowledge." (World Brain)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 威尔斯1938年在《世界大脑》中设想的「永久世界百科全书」与万维网（1991年Tim Berners-Lee发明）和维基百科（2001年创建）惊人吻合。互联网确实实现了让任何人在任何地方获取几乎所有人类知识的愿景。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wells' 1938 'World Brain' vision of a 'permanent world encyclopaedia' remarkably matches the World Wide Web (invented by Tim Berners-Lee in 1991) and Wikipedia (created 2001). The internet indeed realized the vision of anyone anywhere accessing virtually all human knowledge.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯1938年在《世界大脑》中描述了全球知识网络，万维网于1991年发明
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells described a global knowledge network in 'World Brain' (1938); the World Wide Web was invented in 1991

prophecies.a: 「欧洲各国在经历了灾难性的战争之后，将被迫走向经济和政治上的统一。一个联合的欧洲将取代互相争斗的民族国家。」——《新世界秩序》（1940）
prophecies.a_en: "After catastrophic wars, European nations will be forced toward economic and political unification. A united Europe will replace warring nation-states." — The New World Order (1940)
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1993年《马斯特里赫特条约》生效，欧盟正式成立。二战后欧洲从1951年的欧洲煤钢共同体一步步走向经济和政治统一，正如威尔斯所预言的「灾难性战争后欧洲被迫统一」。但欧盟并非完全的政治统一体，2016年英国脱欧显示统一进程仍有波折。
prophecies.verdict_en: The Maastricht Treaty took effect in 1993, formally establishing the EU. Post-WWII Europe progressed from the 1951 European Coal and Steel Community toward economic and political unification, as Wells predicted. However, the EU is not a fully unified political entity, and Brexit in 2016 showed the unification process remains incomplete.
prophecies.yearReason: 威尔斯在小说中设定了该时间背景或预测了该技术出现的时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Wells set this time period or predicted the emergence of this technology in his novels
